授業の概要・背景:
Each week, the class will be divided into 3 parts -
1. A reading task
2. A writing task
3. Studying one of the 10 sublists of the Academic Word List

第1回: Students will be given a homework pack that includes 3 sample reading sections (a total of 30 questions). This is to handed in on the final day of term.
第2回:
【Core Week 1】・Course Implementation Format："Face-to-face class" 《90minutes》
Warm-up/Review - 5 minutes
Reading Task - 35 minutes
Writing Task - 35 minutes
Academic Word List work - Sub list 1 - 15 minutes
Students will be given a homework pack that includes 3 sample reading sections (a total of 30 questions). This is to handed in on the final day of term.
